title: JOMO No-Loss Pool
subtitle: Accumulate crypto, ignore the noise. Walk confidently towards your goal!
aboutDesc: JOMO No-Loss Pool is a decentralized protocol built for the Crypto JOMO community. It utilizes liquid staking (LiNEAR) to generate yield on deposited NEAR. The generated profit is pooled and drawn among participants, while everyone keeps 100% of their initial deposit. No risk of losing your funds!
emptyHistory: History is empty. Be the first winner! 🍀
transparencyDesc: JOMO Pool is a decentralized application. Every deposit, yield generation, and jackpot draw is permanently recorded on the NEAR blockchain.
automationDesc: Our draws are executed on-chain. The smart contract automatically distributes the generated profit, ensuring 100% fairness.
step1Desc: Make a deposit of at least 10 NEAR. Your funds are your tickets. The larger the balance, the higher the chances of winning the jackpot.
step2Desc: The smart contract sends all pool funds to LiNEAR liquid staking, where they constantly generate interest ({{apy}} APY). Your principal is always safe.
step3Desc: An algorithm randomly selects a winner who takes 97% of all yield accumulated by the pool. Didn't win? You lose nothing and participate in the next draw!
exampleText: Imagine the total pool is 10,000 NEAR, and your deposit is 1,000 NEAR (your chance is 10%). The pool generated 50 NEAR in profit. If you win, you take your 1,000 NEAR + 48.5 NEAR jackpot! If not—your 1,000 NEAR stays with you for the next draw.
feeDescription: A small fee of 3% from the PROFIT (not your deposit!) allows us to maintain servers and contract security. No hidden fees!
shortDisclaimer: By participating, you confirm you are 18+ and not a resident of prohibited jurisdictions. JOMO Pool is a no-loss protocol, you can withdraw your deposit. Unstaking takes ~3 days. Use at your own risk.
fullTerms:
1. General Provisions: JOMO Pool is a decentralized protocol on the NEAR blockchain. By using the site, you agree that developers provide only the interface to the smart contract and are not responsible for your funds.

2. Age Restrictions: You must be at least 18 years old.

3. Geographic Restrictions: You confirm you are not a resident of the US, China, or other countries where crypto protocols are prohibited by law.

4. Withdrawal (Unstaking): You can request a withdrawal at any time. Due to technical features of LiNEAR, the unlocking process takes about 3 days (4 epochs). The protocol is not responsible for network delays.

5. No Warranties: The protocol is provided "as is". We do not guarantee the absence of bugs, although the code has undergone basic testing.

6. Responsibility: You are fully responsible for paying taxes in your country on any winnings received.
withdrawWarningDesc: Standard unstaking takes ~3 days. ⚠️ You cannot initiate a new unstake while one is in progress. Claim your funds here when the timer ends.
registerSuccess: Registration successful! You can now log in after verifying your email.
generationError: Failed to generate wallet. Please try again.
nearAlert: Send only NEAR Protocol tokens to this address.
passLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
passAlphanumeric: Password must contain both letters and numbers.
passSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (@, $, !, %, *, ?, &).
setup2faDesc: Enable 2FA to access your wallet. Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
enter2faDesc: Open Google Authenticator and enter your 6-digit code.
privateStakingDesc: Maximum security in your personal dashboard. 2FA protection, key encryption, and direct validator selection for staking.
noLossPoolDesc: Keep your principal, win the collective yield. Public access without registration.
lottoPoolDesc: Classic blockchain lottery. Dedicated domain to play.
encryptionDesc: All sensitive data and private keys are encrypted at rest using military-grade standards.
mfaDesc: Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP) ensure your account remains impenetrable even if your password is compromised.
edgeDesc: Critical blockchain operations run on isolated, highly secure serverless Edge Functions.
activeUnstakeWarning: You already have an active unstake request. Please wait for the timer and claim your funds before withdrawing more.
cantScanCode: Can't scan? Copy this setup key:
recoveryWarning: These codes are the ONLY way to recover your account if you lose your 2FA device. Each code works only once.
securityTipDesc: The safest method is to copy these codes into a secure password manager (1Password, Bitwarden, Apple Keychain). If you download the .txt file, do not keep it permanently on your device to prevent theft by malware.
recoveryFileFooter: Keep these safe! Each code can only be used once.
recoverySuccessMsg: Success! Your 2FA has been disabled. Please log in again to set up a new one.
invalidRecoveryCode: Invalid or already used recovery code.
enterRecoveryCodeDesc: Enter one of your 8-character recovery codes to disable 2FA and regain access.
pageRefreshedMsg: Page refreshed. If you already copied the code to your Authenticator, just enter the 6 digits below to finish.
generateNewQr: I didn't copy it. Generate a new code
insufficientBalanceError: Insufficient balance. You don't have enough shares (~0.0001 network fee).
invalidNearFormat: Invalid NEAR address format. Use only lowercase letters, numbers, '-', '_', or '.'.
invalidNearLength: Address must be between 2 and 64 characters.
emailInUse: This email is already registered. Please log in.
liquidHint: You receive liquid tokens (shares) instantly while earning rewards
insufficientGasReserve: Insufficient balance. Reserve {{reserve}} NEAR for gas.
gasReserveTooltip: This amount is locked to guarantee storage and transaction fees for your wallet.
landingSubtitle: Your secure gateway to the NEAR ecosystem. Experience seamless staking and bulletproof security.
hwStep1Desc: Register and lock your account instantly. We enforce mandatory 2FA (Authenticator) and generate offline Recovery Codes to guarantee only you have access to your vault.
hwStep2Desc: No seed phrases, no complex setups. A secure NEAR wallet is auto-generated the moment you sign up. Your private keys are encrypted and safely managed in the cloud.
hwStep3Desc: Deposit and withdraw your NEAR anytime. JOMO charges a symbolic 0.1% fee on wallet withdrawals. You get professional-grade asset protection at a microscopic cost compared to industry standards.
stakingTitle: Earn Yield via LiNEAR with APY {{apy}}
stakingDesc: Put your NEAR to work safely. Stake your assets to receive liquid tokens and earn passive income.
stakingBullet1: Transparent Fee: Only 0.3% JOMO fee is applied upon withdrawal.
stakingBullet2: Network Unstake: Standard un-staking takes ~2 to 4 days.
stakingBullet3: One Request Limit: The network protocol permits only one active unstake request per user at a time.
cloudWalletDesc: The ultimate decentralized experience is coming. Soon, you will have the option to take absolute control of your keys.
cloudWalletNote: Your private keys will be encrypted entirely client-side using your personal password. You will receive a Secret Recovery Phrase (Seed Phrase) as your ultimate backup.
trueWeb3Rule: True Web3 Rule: You hold your own keys. If you lose both your password and your Seed Phrase, your funds are lost forever.
marketOverviewDesc: Track the real-time price dynamics of the NEAR token.

wallet_types.custodial_desc: Managed by JOMO for maximum simplicity. Secured by 2FA and professional infrastructure. We take care of the technical side.
wallet_types.non_custodial_desc: You have full control over your keys. Encrypted with your password. Note: JOMO cannot recover your funds if you lose your Seed Phrase and password.
wallet_types.security_note_desc: Keep your Seed Phrase safe. Loss of both password AND Seed Phrase = loss of funds.

staking.fee_notice: A 3% service fee is applied only to the net profit earned.
staking.liquid_token_notice: You will receive liquid tokens directly to your wallet.
staking.liquid_token_info: You receive liquid tokens (shares) instantly while earning rewards
staking.active_req_tooltip: You already have an active request
staking.epoch_sync_error: The network is finalizing the current epoch. Please try claiming again later.

wallet_footer.shortDisclaimer: JOMO Vault provides a secure interface for custodial storage and NEAR staking. Cryptocurrencies are subject to high market risks. The standard network unstaking procedure takes approximately 3 days. Please invest responsibly.
wallet_footer.copyright: © 2026 Crypto JOMO Vault. All rights reserved.
wallet_footer.fullTerms:
1. Nature of Services: JOMO Vault provides a custodial wallet and interface to NEAR network smart contracts (including LiNEAR Protocol).
2. Risks: Cryptocurrency deposits are not insured. You accept all risks associated with market volatility.
3. Withdrawals: The standard unstaking process (Delayed Unstake) is controlled by the blockchain and takes about 4 epochs (~48-72 hours). We cannot expedite this process.
4. Fees: JOMO charges a fixed service fee of 0.3% upon withdrawal. Network transaction fees (Gas) are covered by the user.
5. Liability: The platform is not liable for loss of funds due to the compromise of your credentials (password, 2FA).
